payload.title: 2023 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan
payload.description: Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2023, listing recurring and specific agenda items by month including budget, ridership, track program, safety, diversity/EEO, and strategic plan updates.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad, a commuter railroad agency of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority.
Metropolitan Transportation Authority, publisher of the 2023 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan.
MTA Police, provides police activity reports to the Metro-North Railroad Committee.
Long Island Rail Road, referenced in LIRR/MNR PTC Project Update agenda items.
MTA Real Estate provides annual report on leasing and construction opportunities and financial and marketing information related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal.

warnings: entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.description: A monthly report highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
A monthly report highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
MTA Police highlights significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
A monthly report highlighting key operating and performance statistics and indicators.
A monthly report comparing the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast both on an accrual and cash basis.
A monthly report including comparison of actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues with the budget and prior year results.

tool_args.label: Approval of 2023 Committee Work Plan - January 2023

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2023 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
A quarterly report highlighting the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.
The Agency will present its revised 2023 Financial Plan reflecting the 2023 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2023.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service provided to the Committee.
Quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
Report on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2022 based on monthly ticket sales data and results of train ridership counts.

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2022 Operating Results - May 2023

payload.description: Review of prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance.
A quarterly report highlighting progress on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.
Briefing on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.
Quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan - June 2023

payload.event_name: Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan
payload.description: A biannual report to the Committee on Metro-North's progress in setting the standard for safety, reliability and innovation in the delivery of excellent customer service.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal Retail Development - July 2023

payload.description: MTA Real Estate provides an annual report on leasing and construction opportunities and financial and marketing information related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal.
A quarterly report highlighting progress on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2024 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2023 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
Quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2024 Budget.
Briefing on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.
A quarterly report highlighting progress on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.

tool_args.label: Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan - November 2023

payload.event_name: Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan
payload.description: A biannual report to the Committee on Metro-North's progress in setting the standard for safety, reliability and innovation in the delivery of excellent customer service.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2024.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2024 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.
Quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter.

tool_args.raw_text: A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.

payload.description: Quarterly report highlighting progress on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.

tool_args.label: LIRR/MNR PTC Project Update
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.

payload.description: Project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads (LIRR and MNR) going into effect in December 2020.

tool_args.label: Diversity & EEO Report content
tool_args.raw_text: A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.

payload.claim_text: A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints. In alternating quarters, the report will include additional information on diversity initiatives.
payload.subject: Diversity & EEO Report
